objective: Stabilize live observer/publisher execution against current ppomppu markup and verify dry-run publish path under authenticated session.
non_goals: multi-forum runtime implementation beyond ppomppu adapter

completed: Observer selector drift fixed (common-list0/common-list1 support with legacy fallbacks)
BOARD_CONTENT_UNAVAILABLE now writes deterministic board diagnostics artifact JSON
Publisher preflight now attempts guarded login recovery when write button is absent
Publisher write-entry strict locator issue fixed by selecting first matching write button
Draft load path fixed for row-click fallback when explicit 불러오기 control is missing
Forced publisher run succeeds end-to-end in DRY_RUN_MODE=true
gaps: No non-dry-run publish attempted in this session
Live submit safety still gated by DRY_RUN_MODE and operator policy

acceptance_criteria: Observer no longer fails due to stale row selectors on current board markup
Failures remain explicit between board access/content/login/write-entry causes
Publisher can complete dry-run workflow through draft load and content verification

implementation_plan.name: Live-submit readiness gate
actions: Keep DRY_RUN_MODE=true until operator approval for live submission
Run one more forced dry-run smoke to ensure stable login persistence in BOT_PROFILE_DIR

implementation_plan.name: Controlled live validation
actions: Temporarily disable DRY_RUN_MODE in a controlled window
Execute single forced publish and verify post appears with expected category/text
Re-enable DRY_RUN_MODE after validation if continuous auto-live is not approved

practical_recommendations: Preserve BOARD_ROW_SELECTOR fallback chain for future ppomppu class drift
Keep board-diagnostics artifact capture for rapid selector triage
Use xvfb-run in this runtime when headed Playwright is required
completed_items: Selector drift verification completed with captured artifacts
Write-entry and draft load path verified under dry-run
Working tree clean on main; prior handover-related changes committed (incl. bot.ts, state index, parser MCP follow-on)
Continuation 2026-04-04: npm run lint and npm run test:integration pass
pending_items: Operator-approved non-dry-run publish validation (DRY_RUN_MODE=false, single forced publish)

decisions.title: Add guarded login recovery in publisher preflight
decisions.rationale: Persistent profile can be logged out; explicit recovery reduces false write-entry failures while keeping fail-closed behavior

decisions.title: Use row-click fallback for draft loading
decisions.rationale: Current draft list rows are selectable without explicit 불러오기 controls

constraints: Do not weaken safety guards before enabling live publish
Maintain strict env and contract validation at startup
Preserve compatibility with current Express + React + Playwright stack
next_actions: Optional: forced dry-run smoke via POST /api/run-publisher with force:true, DRY_RUN_MODE=true, real BOT_PROFILE_DIR + credentials
Proceed to controlled live-submit validation only after explicit operator approval (disable DRY_RUN_MODE, single publish, re-enable dry-run)
